category_sources: Official BaseX documentation describes it as an XML Database and XQuery processor.
source_facts.description says BaseX is a lightweight XML database and XPath/XQuery processor.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub repository use BaseX.
docs_sources: Official BaseX documentation main page is https://docs.basex.org/main/Main_Page.
repo_sources: Official BaseX open-source page says the source code and issue tracker are on GitHub.
Official GitHub README says the code base can be accessed at https://github.com/BaseXdb/basex.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include xml, xpath, xquery, basex, and xml-database.
source_facts.description identifies XML database, XPath, and XQuery roles.
